vat-checkout-proof.question: Done — I shipped automatic tax. Confirm VAT on one payment link?
vat-checkout-proof.answer:
Couldn't create a payment link
You must specify a tax code in all line items to calculate taxes. Alternatively you can set a default tax code on your tax settings: https://stripe.com/docs/api/tax/settings
